reference: Orthostatic hypotension due to volume depletion from loss of fluids through diarrhea and vomiting could be the cause of this. Ensure she has sufficient intake of water and electrolytes.
text: Orthostatic hypotension due to volume depletion from loss of fluids through diarrhea and vomiting could be the cause of this. Ensure she has sufficient intake of water and electrolytes.
